_meta.keyKnowledge: We select and apply production processes and media concepts to produce media works that communicate ideas and meaning for intended audiences.

_source.w: We select and apply production processes and media concepts to produce media works that communicate ideas and meaning for intended audiences.
y: Advanced production skills enable us to produce professional-quality media that achieves our artistic intentions.
Understanding media concepts at a theoretical level strengthens the purposefulness of our production choices.
Connecting production skills with conceptual understanding is what distinguishes thoughtful media practice.
eg: We manage complex production projects from pre-production planning through to final delivery.
We apply media concepts like representation, ideology and audience positioning in our work.
We use advanced camera, editing and sound techniques to construct sophisticated media texts.
We produce work that demonstrates both technical proficiency and conceptual depth.
We collaborate across production roles, demonstrating professional communication and teamwork.
We produce media arts works in specific genres, applying conventions with understanding and purpose.
